zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Peyton, High Sheriff of Cambridge於1523年出生在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾埃利時，他的父親Robert Peyton25歲，母親Frances Hasilden23歲。他和Elisabeth Rich至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1590年10月19日在英國英格蘭米德萊可享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾易斯勒哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert Peyton, High Sheriff of Cambridge于1523年出生在英国英格兰坎布利其爾埃利时，他的父亲Robert Peyton25岁，母亲Frances Hasilden23岁。他和Elisabeth Rich至少有1个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1590年10月19日在英国英格兰米德萊可享年67岁，埋葬在英国英格兰坎布利其爾易斯勒哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Peyton,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Payton  .

variants.name: Payton
meanings: English (mainly West Midlands): habitational name from Peyton in Ramsholt (Suffolk), derived from the Old English personal name Pǣga + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

Irish (mainly County Donegal): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Peatáin ‘descendant of Peatán’, a pet form of the personal name Pádraig (see Patrick ). Outside County Donegal, the name is apparently mainly of English origin (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: ‘light; beauty; prosperity’, also ‘rank, power, royal majesty’, a byname of the goddesses Lakshmi and Saraswati. Also widely used as an honorific title.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Peyton, High Sheriff of Cambridge was born in 1523, in Ely, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Peyton, was 25 and his mother, Frances Hasilden, was 23. He had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Elisabeth Rich. He died on 19 October 1590, in Middlesex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67, and was buried in Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Peyton, High Sheriff of Cambridge est né en 1523, à Ely, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Peyton, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Frances Hasilden, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Elisabeth Rich. Il est décédé le 19 octobre 1590, à Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Peyton, High Sheriff of Cambridge 1523 in Ely, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Peyton 25 und seine Mutter Frances Hasilden 23. Er hatte mit Elisabeth Rich mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 19. Oktober 1590 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Middlesex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Peyton, High Sheriff of Cambridge è nato il nel 1523 nel Ely, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert Peyton, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Frances Hasilden, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Elisabeth Rich. Morì il 19 ottobre 1590, nel Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Peyton, High Sheriff of Cambridgeが1523年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアエリーで生まれた時，父Robert Peytonは25歳，母Frances Hasildenは23歳であった。彼はElisabeth Richとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1590年10月19日にイギリスイギリスミッドレセックスで67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアイスレハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Peyton, High Sheriff of Cambridge(이)가 1523년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 엘리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Peyton(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Frances Hasilden(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Elisabeth Rich(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1590년 10월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 이슬레함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Peyton, High Sheriff of Cambridge nasceu em 1523, em Ely, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Peyton, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Frances Hasilden, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas com Elisabeth Rich. Ele faleceu em 19 de outubro de 1590, em Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Peyton, High Sheriff of Cambridge родился в 1523 г. в местности эли, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert Peyton было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Frances Hasilden, 23. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Elisabeth Rich. Он умер 19 октября 1590 г. в местности миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности ислэам, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert Peyton, High Sheriff of Cambridge nació en 1523, en Ely, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Peyton, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Frances Hasilden, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas con Elisabeth Rich. Murió el 19 de octubre de 1590, en Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
